title: arctostaphylos peninsularis subsp. peninsularis
intro: Arctostaphylos peninsularis subsp. peninsularis, also known as Point Reyes manzanita or Point Reyes bearberry, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, Ericaceae. It is native to the Point Reyes Peninsula in Marin County, California. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, with potential health benefits including reduced risk of cardiovascular disease and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Arctostaphylos peninsularis subsp. peninsularis include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
